title: Advanced Applications of Variational Methods
description: Explore cutting-edge applications of advanced variational quantum algorithms including molecular dynamics, reaction pathways, strongly correlated materials, and hybrid quantum-classical workflows.
learningObjectives: Apply variational methods to molecular dynamics simulations
Compute reaction pathways and transition states
Simulate strongly correlated materials and Hubbard models
Understand resource estimation for practical applications
Evaluate when quantum advantage is achievable
